name: Talos Energy Inc.
description: Talos Energy Inc. is an independent energy company focused on the exploration, development, and production of oil and natural gas, primarily in the United States Gulf Coast and offshore Mexico. Headquartered in Houston, Texas, the company is committed to safe and responsible energy production. In addition to its core upstream operations, Talos is actively expanding into the energy transition sector, specifically developing carbon capture and sequestration projects to help reduce industrial emissions. The company leverages its deepwater technical expertise to deliver reliable energy solutions while pursuing sustainable growth opportunities in the evolving global energy landscape.
